v.CNV: 我听见有大声音从圣所里发出来，向那七位天使说：“你们去，把　神烈怒的七碗倒在地上！”
v.ESV: Then I heard a loud voice from the temple telling the seven angels, “Go and pour out on the earth the seven bowls of the wrath of God.”
v.GAE: 또 내가 들으니 성전에서 큰 음성이 나서 일곱 천사에게 말하되 너희는 가서 하나님의 진노의 일곱 대접을 땅에 쏟으라 하더라
v.KJV: And I heard a great voice out of the temple saying to the seven angels, Go your ways, and pour out the vials of the wrath of God upon the earth.
v.NASB: Then I heard a loud voice from the temple, saying to the seven angels, 'Go and pour out on the earth the seven bowls of the wrath of God.'
v.NIV: Then I heard a loud voice from the temple saying to the seven angels, “Go, pour out the seven bowls of God’s wrath on the earth.”
v.NRSV: Then I heard a loud voice from the temple telling the seven angels, “Go and pour out on the earth the seven bowls of the wrath of God.”
v.SAENEW: 나는 또 성전에서 큰 음성이 울려오는 것을 들었는데, 그 음성이 일곱 천사들에게 이르기를 "가서, 하나님의 진노가 담긴 일곱 대접을 땅에 쏟아라" 하였습니다.
v.WLB: 그때 나는 성전에서 일곱 천사에게 말씀하시는 큰 소리를 들었습니다. “너희는 가서 하나님의 진노가 담긴 일곱 대접을 땅에 쏟으라.”

v.CNV: 第一位天使去了，把碗倒在地上，就有恶性的毒疮，生在那些有兽的记号和拜兽像的人身上。
v.ESV: So the first angel went and poured out his bowl on the earth, and harmful and painful sores came upon the people who bore the mark of the beast and worshiped its image.
v.GAE: 첫째 천사가 가서 그 대접을 땅에 쏟으매 짐승의 표를 받은 사람들과 그 우상에게 경배하는 자들에게 악하고 독한 종기가 나더라
v.KJV: And the first went, and poured out his vial upon the earth; and there fell a noisome and grievous sore upon the men which had the mark of the beast, and upon them which worshipped his image.
v.NASB: So the first angel went and poured out his bowl on the earth; and it became a loathsome and malignant sore on the people who had the mark of the beast and who worshiped his image.
v.NIV: The first angel went and poured out his bowl on the land, and ugly, festering sores broke out on the people who had the mark of the beast and worshiped its image.
v.NRSV: So the first angel went and poured his bowl on the earth, and a foul and painful sore came on those who had the mark of the beast and who worshiped its image.
v.SAENEW: 그래서 첫째 천사가 나가서 그 대접을 땅에 쏟으니, 짐승의 표를 받은 자들과 그 짐승 우상에게 절하는 자들에게 아주 나쁜 종기가 생겼습니다.
v.WLB: 이에 첫 번째 천사가 가서 그의 대접을 땅에 쏟았습니다. 그러자 짐승의 표를 받고 그 우상에게 절한 사람들에게 흉칙하고 독한 종기가 돋아났습니다.

v.CNV: 第二位天使把碗倒在海里，海水就变成好像死人的血，海里的一切生物都死了。
v.ESV: The second angel poured out his bowl into the sea, and it became like the blood of a corpse, and every living thing died that was in the sea.
v.GAE: 둘째 천사가 그 대접을 바다에 쏟으매 바다가 곧 죽은 자의 피 같이 되니 바다 가운데 모든 생물이 죽더라
v.KJV: And the second angel poured out his vial upon the sea; and it became as the blood of a dead man: and every living soul died in the sea.
v.NASB: The second angel poured out his bowl into the sea, and it became blood like that of a dead man; and every living thing in the sea died.
v.NIV: The second angel poured out his bowl on the sea, and it turned into blood like that of a dead person, and every living thing in the sea died.
v.NRSV: The second angel poured his bowl into the sea, and it became like the blood of a corpse, and every living thing in the sea died.
v.SAENEW: 둘째 천사가 그 대접을 바다에 쏟으니, 바닷물이 죽은 사람의 피처럼 되고, 바다에 있는 모든 생물이 죽었습니다.
v.WLB: 두 번째 천사가 그의 대접을 바다에 쏟았습니다. 그러자 바닷물이 죽은 사람의 피와 같이 변하고 그 가운데 사는 모든 생물이 죽었습니다.

v.CNV: 第三位天使把碗倒在江河和众水的泉源里，水就变成了血。
v.ESV: The third angel poured out his bowl into the rivers and the springs of water, and they became blood.
v.GAE: 셋째 천사가 그 대접을 강과 물 근원에 쏟으매 피가 되더라
v.KJV: And the third angel poured out his vial upon the rivers and fountains of waters; and they became blood.
v.NASB: Then the third angel poured out his bowl into the rivers and the springs of waters; and they became blood.
v.NIV: The third angel poured out his bowl on the rivers and springs of water, and they became blood.
v.NRSV: The third angel poured his bowl into the rivers and the springs of water, and they became blood.
v.SAENEW: 셋째 천사가 그 대접을 강과 샘물에 쏟으니, 물이 피가 되었습니다.
v.WLB: 세 번째 천사가 그의 대접을 강과 샘에 쏟았습니다. 그러자 그것이 피가 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 我听见掌管众水的天使说：“今在昔在的圣者啊！你这样审判是公义的，
v.ESV: And I heard the angel in charge of the waters say, “Just are you, O Holy One, who is and who was, for you brought these judgments.
v.GAE: 내가 들으니 물을 차지한 천사가 이르되 전에도 계셨고 지금도 계신 거룩하신 이여 이렇게 심판하시니 의로우시도다
v.KJV: And I heard the angel of the waters say, Thou art righteous, O Lord, which art, and wast, and shalt be, because thou hast judged thus.
v.NASB: And I heard the angel of the waters saying, 'Righteous are You, who are and who were, O Holy One, because You judged these things;
v.NIV: Then I heard the angel in charge of the waters say: “You are just in these judgments, O Holy One, you who are and who were;
v.NRSV: And I heard the angel of the waters say, “You are just, O Holy One, who are and were, for you have judged these things;
v.SAENEW: 내가 들으니, 물을 주관하는 천사가 말하기를 "지금도 계시고 전에도 계시던 거룩하신 주님, 이렇게 심판하셨으니, 주님은 의로우신 분이십니다.
v.WLB: 또 나는 물을 주관하는 천사가 말하는 것을 들었습니다. “지금도 계시고 전에도 계셨던 거룩하신 이여, 주는 공의로우십니다. 이는 주께서 이것들을 심판하셨기 때문입니다.

v.CNV: 因为他们曾流圣徒和先知的血，现在你给他们血喝，这是他们该受的。”
v.ESV: For they have shed the blood of saints and prophets, and you have given them blood to drink. It is what they deserve!”
v.GAE: 그들이 성도들과 선지자들의 피를 흘렸으므로 그들에게 피를 마시게 하신 것이 합당하니이다 하더라
v.KJV: For they have shed the blood of saints and prophets, and thou hast given them blood to drink; for they are worthy.
v.NASB: for they poured out the blood of saints and prophets, and You have given them blood to drink. They deserve it.'
v.NIV: for they have shed the blood of your holy people and your prophets, and you have given them blood to drink as they deserve.”
v.NRSV: because they shed the blood of saints and prophets, you have given them blood to drink. It is what they deserve!”
v.SAENEW: 그들은 성도들과 예언자들의 피를 흘리게 하였으므로, 주님께서 그들에게 피를 주어, 마시게 하셨습니다. 그들은 그렇게 되어야 마땅합니다" 하였습니다.
v.WLB: 그들이 성도들과 예언자들의 피를 흘렸으므로 주는 그들에게 피를 주어 마시게 하셨습니다. 그들이 그렇게 된 것은 마땅합니다.”

v.CNV: 我又听见祭坛中有声音说：“是的，主啊！全能的　神，你的审判真实、公义！”
v.ESV: And I heard the altar saying, “Yes, Lord God the Almighty, true and just are your judgments!”
v.GAE: 또 내가 들으니 제단이 말하기를 그러하다 주 하나님 곧 전능하신 이시여 심판하시는 것이 참되시고 의로우시도다 하더라
v.KJV: And I heard another out of the altar say, Even so, Lord God Almighty, true and righteous are thy judgments.
v.NASB: And I heard the altar saying, 'Yes, O Lord God, the Almighty, true and righteous are Your judgments.'
v.NIV: And I heard the altar respond: “Yes, Lord God Almighty, true and just are your judgments.”
v.NRSV: And I heard the altar respond, “Yes, O Lord God, the Almighty, your judgments are true and just!”
v.SAENEW: 또 내가 들으니, 제단에서 "그렇습니다. 주 하나님, 전능하신 분, 주님의 심판은 참되고 의롭습니다" 하는 소리가 울려 나왔습니다.
v.WLB: 이때 나는 제단에서 나는 소리를 들었습니다. “그렇습니다. 전능하신 주 하나님, 주의 심판은 참되고 의롭습니다.”

v.CNV: 第四位天使把碗倒在太阳上，太阳就得了能力，可以用火烤人。
v.ESV: The fourth angel poured out his bowl on the sun, and it was allowed to scorch people with fire.
v.GAE: 넷째 천사가 그 대접을 해에 쏟으매 해가 권세를 받아 불로 사람들을 태우니
v.KJV: And the fourth angel poured out his vial upon the sun; and power was given unto him to scorch men with fire.
v.NASB: The fourth angel poured out his bowl upon the sun, and it was given to it to scorch men with fire.
v.NIV: The fourth angel poured out his bowl on the sun, and the sun was allowed to scorch people with fire.
v.NRSV: The fourth angel poured his bowl on the sun, and it was allowed to scorch people with fire;
v.SAENEW: 넷째 천사가 그 대접을 해에다 쏟았습니다. 해는 불로 사람을 태우라는 허락을 받았습니다.
v.WLB: 네 번째 천사가 그의 대접을 해 위에 쏟았습니다. 이에 해는 불로 사람들을 태울 권세를 받았습니다.

v.CNV: 人被高热烧烤，就亵渎那有权柄掌管这些灾难的　神的名，并不悔改，把荣耀归给他。
v.ESV: They were scorched by the fierce heat, and they cursed the name of God who had power over these plagues. They did not repent and give him glory.
v.GAE: 사람들이 크게 태움에 태워진지라 이 재앙들을 행하는 권세를 가지신 하나님의 이름을 비방하며 또 회개하지 아니하고 주께 영광을 돌리지 아니하더라
v.KJV: And men were scorched with great heat, and blasphemed the name of God, which hath power over these plagues: and they repented not to give him glory.
v.NASB: Men were scorched with fierce heat; and they blasphemed the name of God who has the power over these plagues, and they did not repent so as to give Him glory.
v.NIV: They were seared by the intense heat and they cursed the name of God, who had control over these plagues, but they refused to repent and glorify him.
v.NRSV: they were scorched by the fierce heat, but they cursed the name of God, who had authority over these plagues, and they did not repent and give him glory.
v.SAENEW: 그래서 사람들은 몹시 뜨거운 열에 탔습니다. 그러나 그들은 이 재앙을 지배하는 권세를 가지신 하나님의 이름을 모독하였고, 회개하지 않았고, 하나님께 영광을 돌리지 않았습니다.
v.WLB: 사람들은 맹렬한 열에 타 버렸습니다. 그러자 그들은 이 재앙들을 주관하는 권능을 가지신 하나님의 이름을 모독했고 회개해 하나님께 영광을 돌리지 않았습니다.

v.CNV: 第五位天使把碗倒在兽的座位上，兽的国就黑暗了。人因为痛苦就咬自己的舌头。
v.ESV: The fifth angel poured out his bowl on the throne of the beast, and its kingdom was plunged into darkness. People gnawed their tongues in anguish
v.GAE: 또 다섯째 천사가 그 대접을 짐승의 왕좌에 쏟으니 그 나라가 곧 어두워지며 사람들이 아파서 자기 혀를 깨물고
v.KJV: And the fifth angel poured out his vial upon the seat of the beast; and his kingdom was full of darkness; and they gnawed their tongues for pain,
v.NASB: Then the fifth angel poured out his bowl on the throne of the beast, and his kingdom became darkened; and they gnawed their tongues because of pain,
v.NIV: The fifth angel poured out his bowl on the throne of the beast, and its kingdom was plunged into darkness. People gnawed their tongues in agony
v.NRSV: The fifth angel poured his bowl on the throne of the beast, and its kingdom was plunged into darkness; people gnawed their tongues in agony,
v.SAENEW: 다섯째 천사가 그 대접을 짐승의 왕좌에 쏟으니, 짐승의 나라가 어두워지고, 사람들은 괴로움을 못 이겨서 자기들의 혀를 깨물었습니다.
v.WLB: 다섯 번째 천사가 그의 대접을 짐승의 보좌에 쏟았습니다. 그러자 그의 나라가 어둠에 빠지게 됐고 사람들은 고통으로 인해 혀를 깨물었습니다.

v.CNV: 他们又因为所受的痛苦和所生的疮，亵渎天上的　神，并不为自己所作的悔改。
v.ESV: and cursed the God of heaven for their pain and sores. They did not repent of their deeds.
v.GAE: 아픈 것과 종기로 말미암아 하늘의 하나님을 비방하고 그들의 행위를 회개하지 아니하더라
v.KJV: And blasphemed the God of heaven because of their pains and their sores, and repented not of their deeds.
v.NASB: and they blasphemed the God of heaven because of their pains and their sores; and they did not repent of their deeds.
v.NIV: and cursed the God of heaven because of their pains and their sores, but they refused to repent of what they had done.
v.NRSV: and cursed the God of heaven because of their pains and sores, and they did not repent of their deeds.
v.SAENEW: 그들은 아픔과 부스럼 때문에, 하늘의 하나님을 모독하였습니다. 그러나 그들은 자기들의 행동을 회개하지 않았습니다.
v.WLB: 그들은 고통과 종기로 인해 하늘의 하나님을 모독했고 그들의 행위를 회개하지 않았습니다.

v.CNV: 第六位天使把碗倒在幼发拉底大河上，河水就干了，为了要给那些从东方来的王预备道路。
v.ESV: The sixth angel poured out his bowl on the great river Euphrates, and its water was dried up, to prepare the way for the kings from the east.
v.GAE: 또 여섯째 천사가 그 대접을 큰 강 유브라데에 쏟으매 강물이 말라서 동방에서 오는 왕들의 길이 예비되었더라
v.KJV: And the sixth angel poured out his vial upon the great river Euphrates; and the water thereof was dried up, that the way of the kings of the east might be prepared.
v.NASB: The sixth angel poured out his bowl on the great river, the Euphrates; and its water was dried up, so that the way would be prepared for the kings from the east.
v.NIV: The sixth angel poured out his bowl on the great river Euphrates, and its water was dried up to prepare the way for the kings from the East.
v.NRSV: The sixth angel poured his bowl on the great river Euphrates, and its water was dried up in order to prepare the way for the kings from the east.
v.SAENEW: 여섯째 천사가 그 대접을 큰 강 유프라테스에 쏟으니, 강물이 말라 버려서, 해 돋는 곳에서 오는 왕들의 길이 마련되었습니다.
v.WLB: 여섯 번째 천사가 그의 대접을 큰 강 유프라테스에 쏟았습니다. 그러자 그 강의 물이 말라 버려 해 돋는 곳에서부터 오는 왕들의 길이 예비됐습니다.

v.CNV: 我看见三个污灵，好像青蛙从龙口、兽口和假先知的口中出来。
v.ESV: And I saw, coming out of the mouth of the dragon and out of the mouth of the beast and out of the mouth of the false prophet, three unclean spirits like frogs.
v.GAE: 또 내가 보매 개구리 같은 세 더러운 영이 용의 입과 짐승의 입과 거짓 선지자의 입에서 나오니
v.KJV: And I saw three unclean spirits like frogs come out of the mouth of the dragon, and out of the mouth of the beast, and out of the mouth of the false prophet.
v.NASB: And I saw coming out of the mouth of the dragon and out of the mouth of the beast and out of the mouth of the false prophet, three unclean spirits like frogs;
v.NIV: Then I saw three impure spirits that looked like frogs; they came out of the mouth of the dragon, out of the mouth of the beast and out of the mouth of the false prophet.
v.NRSV: And I saw three foul spirits like frogs coming from the mouth of the dragon, from the mouth of the beast, and from the mouth of the false prophet.
v.SAENEW: 나는 또 용의 입과 짐승의 입과 거짓 예언자의 입에서, 개구리와 같이 생긴 더러운 영 셋이 나오는 것을 보았습니다.
v.WLB: 또 나는 용의 입과 짐승의 입과 거짓 예언자의 입에서 개구리 같은 세 더러운 영이 나오는 것을 보았습니다.

v.CNV: 他们原是鬼魔的灵，施行奇事；它们到普天下的众王那里去，叫他们在全能　神的大日聚集作战。
v.ESV: For they are demonic spirits, performing signs, who go abroad to the kings of the whole world, to assemble them for battle on the great day of God the Almighty.
v.GAE: 그들은 귀신의 영이라 이적을 행하여 온 천하 왕들에게 가서 하나님 곧 전능하신 이의 큰 날에 있을 전쟁을 위하여 그들을 모으더라
v.KJV: For they are the spirits of devils, working miracles, which go forth unto the kings of the earth and of the whole world, to gather them to the battle of that great day of God Almighty.
v.NASB: for they are spirits of demons, performing signs, which go out to the kings of the whole world, to gather them together for the war of the great day of God, the Almighty.
v.NIV: They are demonic spirits that perform signs, and they go out to the kings of the whole world, to gather them for the battle on the great day of God Almighty.
v.NRSV: These are demonic spirits, performing signs, who go abroad to the kings of the whole world, to assemble them for battle on the great day of God the Almighty.
v.SAENEW: 그들은 귀신의 영으로서, 기이한 일을 행하면서 온 세계의 왕들을 찾아 돌아다니는데, 그것은 전능하신 하나님의 큰 날에 일어날 전쟁에 대비하여 왕들을 모으려고 하는 것입니다.
v.WLB: 그들은 이적을 행하는 귀신들의 영입니다. 그들은 전능하신 하나님의 큰 날의 전쟁을 위해 온 세상의 왕들을 소집하려고 갑니다.

v.CNV: （看哪，我来像贼一样！那警醒、看守自己衣服的是有福的！他就不至于赤身行走，让人看见他的羞耻。）
v.ESV: (“Behold, I am coming like a thief! Blessed is the one who stays awake, keeping his garments on, that he may not go about naked and be seen exposed!”)
v.GAE: 보라 내가 도둑 같이 오리니 누구든지 깨어 자기 옷을 지켜 벌거벗고 다니지 아니하며 자기의 부끄러움을 보이지 아니하는 자는 복이 있도다
v.KJV: Behold, I come as a thief. Blessed is he that watcheth, and keepeth his garments, lest he walk naked, and they see his shame.
v.NASB: ('Behold, I am coming like a thief. Blessed is the one who stays awake and keeps his clothes, so that he will not walk about naked and men will not see his shame.')
v.NIV: “Look, I come like a thief! Blessed is the one who stays awake and remains clothed, so as not to go naked and be shamefully exposed.”
v.NRSV: (“See, I am coming like a thief! Blessed is the one who stays awake and is clothed, not going about naked and exposed to shame.”)
v.SAENEW: ("보아라, 내가 도둑처럼 올 것이다. 깨어 있어서, 자기 옷을 갖추어 입고, 벌거벗은 몸으로 돌아다니지 않으며, 자기의 부끄러운 데를 남에게 보이지 않는 사람은, 복이 있다.")
v.WLB: “보라. 내가 도둑같이 올 것이다. 깨어서 자기의 옷들을 지켜 벌거벗은 채로 다니지 않고 자기의 수치를 보이지 않는 사람은 복이 있다.”

v.CNV: 污灵就把众王聚集在一个地方，希伯来话叫哈米吉多顿。
v.ESV: And they assembled them at the place that in Hebrew is called Armageddon.
v.GAE: 세 영이 히브리어로 아마겟돈이라 하는 곳으로 왕들을 모으더라
v.KJV: And he gathered them together into a place called in the Hebrew tongue Armageddon.
v.NASB: And they gathered them together to the place which in Hebrew is called Har-Magedon.
v.NIV: Then they gathered the kings together to the place that in Hebrew is called Armageddon.
v.NRSV: And they assembled them at the place that in Hebrew is called Harmagedon.
v.SAENEW: 그 세 영은 히브리 말로 아마겟돈이라고 하는 곳으로 왕들을 모았습니다.
v.WLB: 세 영은 히브리 말로 아마겟돈이라는 곳으로 왕들을 집결시켰습니다.

v.CNV: 第七位天使把碗倒在空中，就有大声音从圣所的宝座上发出来，说：“成了！”
v.ESV: The seventh angel poured out his bowl into the air, and a loud voice came out of the temple, from the throne, saying, “It is done!”
v.GAE: 일곱째 천사가 그 대접을 공중에 쏟으매 큰 음성이 성전에서 보좌로부터 나서 이르되 되었다 하시니
v.KJV: And the seventh angel poured out his vial into the air; and there came a great voice out of the temple of heaven, from the throne, saying, It is done.
v.NASB: Then the seventh angel poured out his bowl upon the air, and a loud voice came out of the temple from the throne, saying, 'It is done.'
v.NIV: The seventh angel poured out his bowl into the air, and out of the temple came a loud voice from the throne, saying, “It is done!”
v.NRSV: The seventh angel poured his bowl into the air, and a loud voice came out of the temple, from the throne, saying, “It is done!”
v.SAENEW: 일곱째 천사가 그 대접을 공중에 쏟으니, 성전에서 보좌로부터 "다 되었다" 하는 큰 음성이 울려 나왔습니다.
v.WLB: 일곱 번째 천사가 그의 대접을 공중에 쏟았습니다. 그러자 성전 보좌에서 “다 끝났다”라는 큰 음성이 들려왔습니다.

v.CNV: 于是有闪电、响声、雷轰和大地震，自从地上有人以来，没发生过这么大的地震，
v.ESV: And there were flashes of lightning, rumblings, peals of thunder, and a great earthquake such as there had never been since man was on the earth, so great was that earthquake.
v.GAE: 번개와 음성들과 우렛소리가 있고 또 큰 지진이 있어 얼마나 큰지 사람이 땅에 있어 온 이래로 이같이 큰 지진이 없었더라
v.KJV: And there were voices, and thunders, and lightnings; and there was a great earthquake, such as was not since men were upon the earth, so mighty an earthquake, and so great.
v.NASB: And there were flashes of lightning and sounds and peals of thunder; and there was a great earthquake, such as there had not been since man came to be upon the earth, so great an earthquake was it, and so mighty.
v.NIV: Then there came flashes of lightning, rumblings, peals of thunder and a severe earthquake. No earthquake like it has ever occurred since mankind has been on earth, so tremendous was the quake.
v.NRSV: And there came flashes of lightning, rumblings, peals of thunder, and a violent earthquake, such as had not occurred since people were upon the earth, so violent was that earthquake.
v.SAENEW: 또 번개가 치고, 음성들이 나고, 천둥이 울리고, 큰 지진이 일어났는데, 이런 큰 지진은 사람이 땅 위에 생겨난 뒤로 일찍이 없었던 것입니다.
v.WLB: 그때 번개들과 요란한 소리들과 천둥치는 소리들이 있었고 큰 지진이 일어났는데 사람이 땅 위에 존재한 이래로 이렇게 큰 지진은 없었습니다.

v.CNV: 那大城裂为三段，列国的城也都倒塌了。　神也想起巴比伦大城来，要把自己烈怒的酒杯递给它。
v.ESV: The great city was split into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell, and God remembered Babylon the great, to make her drain the cup of the wine of the fury of his wrath.
v.GAE: 큰 성이 세 갈래로 갈라지고 만국의 성들도 무너지니 큰 성 바벨론이 하나님 앞에 기억하신 바 되어 그의 맹렬한 진노의 포도주 잔을 받으매
v.KJV: And the great city was divided into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell: and great Babylon came in remembrance before God, to give unto her the cup of the wine of the fierceness of his wrath.
v.NASB: The great city was split into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell. Babylon the great was remembered before God, to give her the cup of the wine of His fierce wrath.
v.NIV: The great city split into three parts, and the cities of the nations collapsed. God remembered Babylon the Great and gave her the cup filled with the wine of the fury of his wrath.
v.NRSV: The great city was split into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell. God remembered great Babylon and gave her the wine-cup of the fury of his wrath.
v.SAENEW: 그리고 그 큰 도시가 세 조각이 나고, 민족들의 도시들도 무너졌습니다. 하나님께서 그 큰 도시 바빌론을 기억하셔서, 하나님의 진노를 나타내는 독한 포도주의 잔을 그 도시에 내리시니,
v.WLB: 또 큰 도성이 세 조각으로 나눠지고 나라들의 도성들이 무너졌습니다. 하나님께서 큰 도성 바벨론을 기억하시고 그의 맹렬한 진노의 포도주 잔을 바벨론에게 내리셨습니다.

v.CNV: 各海岛都逃避了，众山也不见了。
v.ESV: And every island fled away, and no mountains were to be found.
v.GAE: 각 섬도 없어지고 산악도 간 데 없더라
v.KJV: And every island fled away, and the mountains were not found.
v.NASB: And every island fled away, and the mountains were not found.
v.NIV: Every island fled away and the mountains could not be found.
v.NRSV: And every island fled away, and no mountains were to be found;
v.SAENEW: 모든 섬들이 사라지고, 산들이 자취를 감추었습니다.
v.WLB: 또 모든 섬이 온데간데없이 사라지고 산들도 찾을 수 없게 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 有大冰雹从天上落在人的身上，每块重约四十公斤。由于这冰雹的灾，人就亵渎　神，因为这灾太严重了。
v.ESV: And great hailstones, about one hundred pounds each, fell from heaven on people; and they cursed God for the plague of the hail, because the plague was so severe.
v.GAE: 또 무게가 한 달란트나 되는 큰 우박이 하늘로부터 사람들에게 내리매 사람들이 그 우박의 재앙 때문에 하나님을 비방하니 그 재앙이 심히 큼이러라
v.KJV: And there fell upon men a great hail out of heaven, every stone about the weight of a talent: and men blasphemed God because of the plague of the hail; for the plague thereof was exceeding great.
v.NASB: And huge hailstones, about one hundred pounds each, came down from heaven upon men; and men blasphemed God because of the plague of the hail, because its plague was extremely severe.
v.NIV: From the sky huge hailstones, each weighing about a hundred pounds, fell on people. And they cursed God on account of the plague of hail, because the plague was so terrible.
v.NRSV: and huge hailstones, each weighing about a hundred pounds, dropped from heaven on people, until they cursed God for the plague of the hail, so fearful was that plague.
v.SAENEW: 그리고 무게가 한 달란트나 되는 큰 우박이 하늘로부터 사람들 위에 떨어지니, 사람들은 우박의 재앙이 너무도 심해서, 하나님을 모독하였습니다.
v.WLB: 또 하늘에서 무게가 1달란트나 되는 큰 우박이 사람들에게 떨어졌습니다. 그러자 사람들은 우박의 재앙을 인해 하나님을 모독했습니다. 이는 그 재앙이 너무 컸기 때문입니다.
